heading: Omitted
label: 1341 to 1344 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1341 to 1344 were omitted as not of general application, and as covered by the Canal Zone Code. The Canal Zone Code was subsequently redesignated the Panama Canal Code by , and repealed by .Pub. L. 96–70, § 3303(b)Pub.
